title: Sterling CPL155 Combination Padlock, Zinc Alloy, 55mm
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
description: From the manufacturer Lock Out Padlocks Anti-spark brass shackle 40mm brass body For use with the Lock Out Hasp Available in 6 colour coded bodies Can be used as a standard padlock Double locking Health & Safety Regulation Lock Out Hasps Available in two sizes Sizes available: 25mm and 38mm with 9mm hole diameters Ideal for use with Sterling lockout padlocks Allows for up to 6 workers to lock off an individual energy source Used mainly in industry to isolate plant and machinery Available in red only Need a weatherproof padlock Then we have a couple of these as well too Corrosion resistant aluminium body Protected hardened steel chrome plated shackle Double locking Thermoplastic weatherproof jacket Available in two sizes - 48 or 57mm Sterling Security Rating: 5 (48mm) and 6½ (57mm) Need a padlock for your suitcase, why not try one of these! TSA Luggage Padlocks Travel Sentry is the luggage security system officially recognised by: TSA (Transport Security Administration) at all US airports and Canada HMRC (Her Majesty's Reveue & Customs) in the UK These are a 26mm padlock with a steel shackle and resettable combination. They have a Sterling Security Rating of 1½ Sterling Security Rating Our Security rating ins a simple to follow guide which denotes the strength and application of the relevant padlocks, hasps & staples. The colour coding shows the light, mid or heavy use of the padlock while the Security Rating shows how effective the appropriate padlock will be. Aluminium Combination Padlock The aluminium combination padlock is available in two sizes, 30 and 40mm. They have a resettable combination and are ideal for lockers. Anodised aluminium body Corrosion resistant Steel shackle No key s to lose Our wide range of postboxes We have a wide range of postboxes to suit a variety of needs from a small suggestion box to a large parcel box. In classical, traditional and modern design, available in a range of colour options and some in stainless steel. They are all weather resistant. Lock or combination cashboxes Our range of cashboxes are available in different sizes from 6" to 12", with a lock or with a combination. Need a tray to keep your coins organised, we have them too. These come ins various colours. Something to suit everybodies needs. SafeCan Range The SafeCan range is an ideal place to hide money, passports, jewellery and valuables. Simply remove the base to reveal a secret compartment Locking Cables And then we have our coloured locking cables. Manufactured in braided steel for increased strength and flexibility. The 1012K is self coiling and avalable in either green or purple. The Sterling security rating for these is 4 We do have other sizes and options available.
